name: @rhombus-std/di.core
description: The ioc abstractions substrate: the dependency-signature data format, the slot/token surface + helpers, and the concrete registration builder (ServiceManifest) a library author depends on to author registrations without the di resolution engine. Depends only on the primitives leaf for the augmentation registry.
//rhombus.preset: Intended primitive-stage bundle for the type-driven registration sugar: inline -> nameof -> signatureof, in the binary's canonical order. A consumer wanting single-name auto-discovery of the whole set needs the ttsc marker to carry an array of transforms; stock ttsc (0.18) accepts only a single 'ttsc.plugin.transform' string, so the bundle is declared explicitly in a consumer's tsconfig plugins today (see tests/di.signatureof.ttsc.e2e). The ttsc marker-array extension is the follow-up that makes this preset auto-discoverable.
